subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Divine guidance is a priceless gem, gleaming and resplendent as the adornment of the crown of eternal glory [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
